body.purpose: All prose, descriptive text, form field values. Max line-length 65–75ch on desktop.

title.purpose: Section headings, card headers, modal titles. Used sparingly.

label.purpose: Button text, form labels, nav links, table headers, badge text.

code.purpose: Phone numbers in technical contexts, JSON viewers, API values.

shadows.name: focus-primary
shadows.purpose: Focus ring on all primary-color interactive elements. The only permitted shadow in the base system.

shadows.name: ambient-float
shadows.purpose: Reserved for floating panels (future use only): toasts, popovers. Not for cards or nav.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, active). 150–200ms.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Button hover, badge color change, focus ring appearance.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Panel slides, dropdown opens, modal entry.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Signal Orange background. Nav bar and form submit contexts.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: #ffffff; background-color: #fa5619; border: 1px solid #fa5619; border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #e04d15; border-color: #e04d15; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(250,86,25,0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background-color: #c94410; border-color: #c94410; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Success Button (Send)
components.description: Confirmation and send-message actions. Clearline Teal. Chat and modal confirm contexts.
components.css: .ds-btn-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: #ffffff; background-color: #18bc9c; border: 1px solid #18bc9c; border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-success:hover { background-color: #14a487; border-color: #14a487; } .ds-btn-success:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(24,188,156,0.25); } .ds-btn-success:active { background-color: #108c72; border-color: #108c72; } .ds-btn-success:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Outline Success Button
components.description: Secondary action adjacent to a teal primary. E.g. 'Nova conversa' in the room list header.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: #18bc9c; background-color: transparent; border: 1px solid #18bc9c; border-radius: 4px; padding: 5px 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-outline-success:hover { background-color: #18bc9c; color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-outline-success:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(24,188,156,0.25); } .ds-btn-outline-success:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form text field. White background, signal-orange focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex: 1; } .ds-input { width: 100%; font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; color: #52665a; background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 12px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6c757d; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #fa5619; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(250,86,25,0.25); } .ds-input:disabled { background-color: #f5f5f8; opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container. Flat white on light-gray surface. No shadow.
components.html:
Licenciados

Conteúdo do card aqui.
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-header { padding: 12px 16px; background-color: #f8f9fa; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6; font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #333333; } .ds-card-body { padding: 16px; } .ds-card-text { font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; color: #52665a; margin: 0; }

components.name: Room List Item
components.description: Signature component. Contact name, phone/preview, unread badge. Selected state uses Signal Orange.
components.html:
• João Silva
    (11) 99999-0001
    Oi, preciso de ajuda com...
    3
  • Maria Souza
    (11) 98888-0002
components.css: .ds-room-list { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-room-item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 16px; cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-room-item:hover { background-color: #fcefeb; } .ds-room-item--selected { background-color: #fa5619; } .ds-room-item--selected .ds-room-item-name { color: #ffffff; } .ds-room-item--selected .ds-room-item-sub, .ds-room-item--selected .ds-room-item-preview { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.80); } .ds-room-item-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; min-width: 0; } .ds-room-item-name { font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #333333; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-room-item-sub { font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #6c757d; } .ds-room-item-preview { font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #6c757d; max-width: 180px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-unread-badge { flex-shrink: 0; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 20px; height: 20px; padding: 0 6px; background-color: #18bc9c; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 50rem; margin-top: 2px; }

components.name: Chat Bubble — Sent
components.description: Outbound message from the agent. Clearline Teal, right-aligned.
components.html: Olá! Em que posso ajudar?
components.css: .ds-bubble-wrap { display: flex; padding: 2px 0; } .ds-bubble-wrap--sent { justify-content: flex-end; } .ds-bubble-wrap--received { justify-content: flex-start; } .ds-bubble { max-width: 70%; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.45; word-break: break-word; } .ds-bubble--sent { background-color: #18bc9c; color: #ffffff; } .ds-bubble--received { background-color: #f0f0f0; color: #2c3e50; }

components.name: Chat Bubble — Received
components.description: Inbound message from the contact. Light gray, left-aligned.
components.html: Oi, preciso de ajuda com meu pedido!
components.css: .ds-bubble-wrap { display: flex; padding: 2px 0; } .ds-bubble-wrap--sent { justify-content: flex-end; } .ds-bubble-wrap--received { justify-content: flex-start; } .ds-bubble { max-width: 70%; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.45; word-break: break-word; } .ds-bubble--sent { background-color: #18bc9c; color: #ffffff; } .ds-bubble--received { background-color: #f0f0f0; color: #2c3e50; }

narrative.overview:
eComanda's visual system is built for people who are always on. Support agents cycle through dozens of conversations in a shift; admins configure a system that other people depend on. The design does not try to impress either of them — it tries to disappear. Flat surfaces, a restrained palette, and a single moment of orange energy at the top of the viewport: that's the whole idea. The interface should feel like a trusted tool that has been used for years, not a product demo.

The orange (#fa5619, Signal Orange) is the system's one committed voice. It anchors the navigation bar, marks primary actions, and then steps back completely. Everything else lives in warm neutral territory: the Fieldwork Gray body text (#52665a) carries a green undertone that stops it feeling cold, and the Clearline Teal (#18BC9C) handles confirmations and outbound chat messages — a functional accent, not a decorative one.

The system explicitly rejects cold, gray committee-built software and the performative polish of hyped SaaS products. eComanda is neither. It is warm without being casual. It is operational without being cold.
keyCharacteristics: Flat surfaces — no drop shadows, tonal layering through background shifts only
Single accent strategy: Signal Orange for navigation and primary actions, Clearline Teal for confirmations and chat
Jost as the sole typeface — geometric-humanist, readable at small sizes, consistent across headings and data
Warm neutral body text, not gray — Fieldwork Gray's green undertone is the warmth carrier
Generous, considered component sizing — built for all-day use, not a demo

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Signal Orange appears on ≤ 15% of any given screen. It lives in the nav bar and on primary buttons. Any other use — decorative borders, background fills, gradient accents — is prohibited. Its authority comes from its restraint.

rules.name: The Teal Ownership Rule
rules.body: Clearline Teal owns the chat send action and outbound message bubbles. Do not use it for non-chat primary buttons or as a general success color — that's what Semantic Success (#11ad66) is for.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The only permitted shadow in the current system is Bootstrap's focus-ring. Do not add box-shadow to cards, nav bars, modals, or buttons as decoration.

rules.name: The Single Family Rule
rules.body: Jost is the only typeface in this system. Do not introduce a display serif, a decorative script, or a second sans for headings. Hierarchy lives in weight (400/500/600) and size, not in family contrast.

rules.name: The Label Weight Rule
rules.body: Interactive elements — buttons, nav links, form labels — always render at weight 500 (Label level). Weight 400 (Body) in a button reads as a UI bug, not a design choice.

dos: Do reserve Signal Orange for the navigation bar and primary action buttons.
Do use Clearline Teal for the send button, sent message bubbles, and unread count badges.
Do use Fieldwork Gray (#52665a) for body text — don't replace it with a cooler gray.
Do keep surfaces flat — white on light gray, no shadows.
Do size interactive elements generously (minimum touch target 44×44px on mobile).
Do use semantic badges for conversation status (open / pending / closed).
Do load Jost via a <link> or @import — the CSS declaration without a source will silently fall back.
Do keep the chat sidebar at 30% width / 280px minimum.
donts: Don't build cold, gray, committee-designed layouts (Salesforce/SAP pattern).
Don't add gradient fills, hero-metric templates, or performative surface polish (Intercom/Notion pattern).
Don't add box-shadow to cards, buttons, or panels as decoration — the system is flat.
Don't use Signal Orange outside the nav bar and primary action buttons.
Don't use .text-muted (#6c757d) for primary body content — it fails 4.5:1 contrast on white.
Don't reinvent standard affordances — Bootstrap's controls are the vocabulary.
Don't default to modals — exhaust inline and progressive disclosure first.
